cmd:
: echo "Starting search..."
grep -r -i "needle" . 2>/dev/null || echo "No needle found in content"
echo "---"
echo "Searching in filenames..."
find . -name "*needle*" -o -name "*NEEDLE*" 2>/dev/null || echo "No needle in filenames"
echo "---"
echo "Checking hidden files..."
ls -la | grep -i needle || echo "No needle in directory listing"
echo "---"
echo "Searching in base64 encoded content..."
grep -r "" . 2>/dev/null | base64 -d 2>/dev/null | grep -i "needle" || echo "No base64 needle found"
output_preview:
./.git/logs/HEAD:0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 249c5641f270ff265e99e2de1457e60dcd0724c7 needle-bench <bench@needle-bench.cc> 1775062987 +0000	commit (initial): baseline
./.git/logs/refs/heads/master:0000000000000000000000000000000000000000 249c5641f270ff265e99e2de1457e60dcd0724c7 needle-bench <bench@needle-bench.cc> 1775062987 +0000	commit (initial): baseline
./Dockerfile:    git config --global user.email "bench@needle-bench.cc" && \
./Dockerfile:    git config --global user.name "ne

cmd:
: echo "=== Searching all files deeply ==="
find . -type f -not -path "*/\.git/*" -exec grep -l "." {} \; 2>/dev/null | while read file; do
  echo "Checking: $file"
  grep -i "needle" "$file" 2>/dev/null && echo "FOUND in $file"
done

echo "=== Checking for encoded or obfuscated needle ==="
find . -type f -not -path "*/\.git/*" -print0 2>/dev/null | xargs -0 strings 2>/dev/null | grep -i needle

echo "=== Looking in source code directory ==="
find src -type f 2>/dev/null
find classes -type f 2>/

cmd:
: echo "=== Examining all source files ==="
for file in src/*.java; do
  echo "================================"
  echo "FILE: $file"
  echo "================================"
  cat "$file"
  echo ""
done
